author: pietroGru
body:
#### PR description:
Follow up to address the [comment](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51488#issuecomment-4994314202) by @mmusich in the linked #51488 pull request. As in that case, this pull request contains a commit to fix the axes' labels of the `PrimaryVertexMonitor` accordingly to the track's pT cut.

#### PR validation:
The code compiles ok. No physics validation is required.
title: Update `PrimaryVertexMonitor` axes labels accordingly to track pT cut
